subject: refactor(ux): move restore-from-backup to burger menu
body:
Extracted restore logic into useRestoreWorkspace composable. Burger
menu now has "Restore from backup" item — always accessible from any
page. Workspace list header simplified to just "New Workspace".
Empty state keeps "Restore from file" as a discovery affordance,
calling the injected trigger from AppLayout via provide/inject.

Tags: ux, burger-menu, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: data-management
Semver: minor
